recommendations.title: A Perfect Man
recommendations.overview: A struggling writer finds a shortcut to fame, but a blackmailer threatens to ruin his perfect life.

recommendations.title: Guru
recommendations.overview: Matt, a charismatic coach, captivates crowds until he spirals into a disturbing downward spiral.

recommendations.title: Black Box
recommendations.overview: Mathieu is a young and talented black box analyst on a mission to solve the reason behind the deadly crash of a brand new aircraft. Yet, when the case is closed by authorities, Mathieu cannot help but sense there is something wrong with the evidence.

recommendations.title: Caged

recommendations.title: Visions
recommendations.overview: An experienced airline pilot, Estelle leads a perfect life between long-haul flights with her loving, protective husband Guillaume. One day, by chance, in an airport corridor, she crosses paths with Ana, a photographer with whom she had a passionate

recommendations.title: Scarface
recommendations.overview: After getting a green card in exchange for assassinating a Cuban government official, Tony Montana stakes a claim on the drug trade in Miami. Viciously murdering anyone who stands in his way, Tony eventually becomes the biggest drug lord in the state

recommendations.title: One Fast Move
recommendations.overview: A dishonorably discharged soldier seeks out his estranged father to help him pursue his dream of becoming a professional motorcycle racer. While training, he meets a small-town, aspiring singer and a motorcycle shop owner who begin to break down the

recommendations.title: Overhaul
recommendations.overview: When truck racer Roger loses everything, he receives a tempting but dangerous offer: to work as the getaway driver for a gang of thieves.

recommendations.title: Shinjuku Incident
recommendations.overview: A simple Chinese immigrant wages a perilous war against one of the most powerful criminal organizations on the planet.

recommendations.title: The System
recommendations.overview: When a young soldier, newly returned from war, gets caught up in a drug bust, he is recruited by the authorities to go undercover in a notoriously dangerous prison in order to figure out what is really going on.
